news.summary: Stocks experienced a decline today following President Trump's announcement of potential tariffs on the European Union. The stock market faced a downturn due to this news. Additionally, a White House executive order resulted in a significant increase in the stock prices of nuclear companies. Meanwhile, there is anticipation surrounding Nvidia's upcoming earnings report that is impacting market dynamics.
news.headline: Stocks fell due to Trump's EU tariff threat, while nuclear stocks soared on White House order, Nvidia earnings ahead.

news.summary: A renowned company in structural engineering and construction solutions in Southern California, Alpha Structural, Inc., recently completed a significant pedestrian bridge replacement project in Stanton. The successful completion of this project marks another achievement for Alpha Structural, Inc., showcasing their expertise and capabilities. This project is important for the city as it provides improved infrastructure for pedestrians. The project was completed on May 23, 2025, and signifies a milestone for Alpha Structural, Inc. in their commitment to delivering high-quality engineering and construction solutions in Southern California.
news.headline: Alpha Structural, Inc. finished reconstructing Stanton Pedestrian Bridge after bizarre car crash.

news.summary: In New Orleans on May 23, 2025, Charles C. Foti, Jr., the former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed an investigation by KSF into NAPCO Security Technologies, Inc. (NasdaqGS: NSSC). The investigation began on August 18, and aims to look into undisclosed details about the company's operations.
news.headline: Former Louisiana AG continues investigation into NAPCO Security Technologies officers and directors. New Orleans- May 23, 2025.

news.summary: On May 19, 2025, Midland States Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: MSBI) received a deficiency notification from Nasdaq due to not complying with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). The company failed to timely file its Annual Report on Form 10-K for 2024 and its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for Q1 2025. This was disclosed in the Form 12b-25 submitted to the SEC on May 9, 2025. Nasdaq Listing Rule mandates timely filing of all necessary periodic reports with the SEC to maintain compliance.
news.headline: Midland States Bancorp, Inc. notified of Nasdaq deficiency due to delayed filing of Quarterly Report and Annual Report.
Moody's: Italy's outlook change to Positive reflects improved fiscal outlook against the backdrop of a better-than-expected fiscal performance in 2024.
Moody's Ratings changes Italy's outlook to positive.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 23, 2025, Almaden Minerals Ltd. declared the implementation of a Key Persons Retention Agreement (KPA) aimed at retaining crucial staff members possessing vital historical insights and expertise essential for the company's global arbitration case (the "Claim") related to the Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership with Mexico. Almaden Minerals Ltd., listed under TSX: AMM and OTCQB: AAUAF, took this initiative to secure employees pivotal to the proceedings.
news.headline: Almaden Minerals Ltd. creates Key Persons Retention Agreement for key personnel in international arbitration; aims to retain important historical info.
ITALY'S OUTLOOK RAISED TO POSITIVE FROM STABLE BY MOODY'S

news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that a total of 1,500 new cases of COVID-19 have been recorded in the past 24 hours. This brings the total number of confirmed cases in the country to 75,000. Additionally, there have been 20 new fatalities, raising the death toll to 1,200. The government has extended the lockdown measures for another two weeks in order to curb the spread of the virus. Hospital admissions have also increased by 10%, with 500 new patients requiring medical attention. Scientists are working on developing a vaccine, but it is still in the early stages of testing. The public is urged to adhere to social distancing guidelines and practice good hygiene to help prevent further infections.
news.headline: S&P 500 drops as Trump indicates no EU deal; market update without source.

news.summary: In May 23, 2025, NASA has granted a bridge contract to ASRC Federal System Solutions LLC based in Beltsville, Maryland. The contract aims to deliver financial assistance along with project planning and control services to NASA. This specific contract, known as the Program Analysis and Control Bridge Contract, involves a total sum of money.
news.headline: NASA awards bridge contract to ASRC Federal System Solutions LLC for financial support and project planning with a total value of undisclosed amount.

news.summary: In Morris, Illinois on May 23, 2025, Jonathan T. Constantine, DMD was recognized as a 2025 Pinnacle Lifetime Member in Dentistry. He was highlighted in The Inner Circle for his significant contributions to the field. Dr. Constantine, a third-generation dentist, is devoted to patient education and upholding the values of the profession.
news.headline: Dentist Jonathan T. Constantine named 2025 Pinnacle Lifetime Member by The Inner Circle for contributions to Dentistry.

news.summary: The Chairman, President, and CEO of Coeur Mining, Inc. (NYSE: CDE) Mitchell J. Krebs will be attending the Raymond James Silver Conference in London on May 28, 2025. The conference is exclusive to invitees and will feature Coeur as a participant. Interested parties can access presentation materials on the company's official website. Coeur Mining, Inc. is a US company with a strong presence in the mining industry.
news.headline: Coeur Mining CEO to attend Raymond James Silver Conference in London on May 28, 2025. For more info visit www.coeur.com.

news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on May 23, 2025, Solitron Devices, Inc. (OTC Pink: SODI) unveiled its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year of 2025. The company shared its performance figures for the period, indicating a successful year in terms of financial growth and stability.
news.headline: Solitron Devices, Inc. reports fiscal 2025 Q4 and full-year results. Stock symbol: SODI. May 23, 2025.
US TREASURY ISSUES IMMEDIATE SANCTIONS RELIEF FOR SYRIA

news.summary: Alvin, Texas, in collaboration with W Land Development, a leading residential real estate developer, recently commenced the construction of Preservation Creek, a 2,900-acre master-planned community located in the Austin Bayou District. The development marks a significant step in shaping the future growth of the west-end of Alvin under a new economic initiative zone. Preservation Creek is a testament to the dedication to conserving the pristine landscapes of the region and is set to influence the upcoming era of expansion in the area.
news.headline: Alvin City and W Land Development team up to launch the 2,900-acre Preservation Creek in Austin Bayou District, aiming for sustainable growth.
Total voting rights and shares info disclosed without specifying the source.

news.summary: Calgary, Alberta, and Toronto, on May 23, 2025, Magnetic North Acquisition Corp. (TSXV: MNC; MNC.PR.A) has issued an update regarding the management cease trade order granted on May 9, 2025. This order was given by the Alberta Securities Commission under National Policy 12-203 - Management Cease Trade Orders due to the Company's inability to file its audited annual financial statements, management’s discussion and analysis, and related certifications for the year ended December 31, 2024, by the required deadline of April 30, 2025. Magnetic North plans to submit these documents by June 30, 2025.
news.headline: Magnetic North Acquisition Corp. updates on management cease trade order, aims to file required financial documents by June 30, 2025.

news.summary: Captivision Inc., a leading LED solution provider (NASDAQ: CAPT), recently disclosed receiving a Letter on May 22, 2025, from Nasdaq stating non-compliance with Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to the delay in filing its 20-F report for the period ending December 31, 2024, with the SEC. This notification doesn't pose an immediate delisting threat or impact the securities' listing or trading on Nasdaq. This Letter follows previous notifications about non-compliance with Nasdaq's listing standards on publicly held shares' market value, minimum bid price, and listed securities' market value.
news.headline: Captivision notified by Nasdaq for delayed Form 20-F filing, not in compliance with Nasdaq Rule 5250(c)(1), no immediate delisting effect.

news.summary: Viomi Technology Co., Ltd, a prominent technology company specializing in home water solutions in China, recently disclosed that it has been informed by the NASDAQ Stock Market, through a letter dated May 21, 2025, regarding non-compliance with NASDAQ Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). The company, listed as VIOT on NASDAQ, failed to meet the deadline for submitting its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. This notification, termed the "Delinquency Letter," raised concerns about Viomi's continued listing status.
news.headline: Viomi, a technology company based in China, has received a NASDAQ notice for a late filing of Form 20-F related to its annual report for the year ended December 31, 2024.

news.summary: Recently, Coinbase disclosed disturbing information regarding its data breach, implicating Strategy in a class action lawsuit. Additionally, three banks are deliberating the creation of a stablecoin.
news.headline: Coinbase data breach aftermath revealed, MSTR faces lawsuit, 3 banks eye stablecoin. #crypto #hacking #lawsuit

news.summary: In Chicago on May 23, 2025, United Airlines and the Association of Flight Attendants-CWA disclosed a potential agreement that promises top-tier salaries and various enhancements for United's 28,000 flight attendants upon approval. The finalized contract details are set to be finalized in the near future.
news.headline: United and Association of Flight Attendants reach agreement for higher wages and benefits for 28,000 flight attendants.

news.summary: This week, significant amounts of money flowed into exchange-traded funds for both Bitcoin and Ethereum as investors enthusiastically purchased crypto assets.
news.headline: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs collectively gain over $1 billion in one day, drawing significant investor interest in crypto assets.

Markets this week felt like The Big Short on 2x speed: bonds cracking, credit spreads screaming, and everyone pretending it’s fine. It’s Friday — log off before someone tries to sell you a synthetic CDO.

news.summary: Universal Corporation (NYSE: UVV) has named Fay Manolios as a new member of its Board of Directors, starting from June 1, 2025. This appointment follows the retirement decision of Michael T. Lawton, an independent director since 2016, who will not seek re-election at the 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on August 5, 2025. With over 25 years of experience, Ms. Manolios’ addition expands the Board's expertise and vision for the future.
news.headline: Fay Manolios appointed to Universal Corporation (NYSE: UVV) Board of Directors, while Michael T. Lawton retires after nine years.

news.summary: Phoenix, May 23, 2025 - DBM Global Inc. ("DBMG"), a group of companies offering complete steel construction services and a subsidiary of INNOVATE Corp. (NYSE: VATE), revealed plans to distribute a cash dividend worth roughly $5.5 million, equivalent to $1.42 per share. The dividend is set to be paid out on June 16, 2025, to stockholders of record as of June 2, 2025.
news.headline: DBM Global to pay $5.5 million cash dividend, $1.42 per share, on June 16, 2025 to stockholders.

news.summary: Two academic assessment leaders from the University of Phoenix, Eric Page, Ed.D., senior manager, Assessment, and Gretchen Meyers, Ed.D., director, Assessment, participated in the Association for the Assessment of Learning in Higher Education (AALHE) national conference from May 27-30, 2025 in Alexandria, Virginia. Page and Meyers were chosen to lead a Skills Development Workshop titled, "A workshop on implementing the Theory to Practice Generative AI Assessment Framework." The conference gathered professionals to discuss assessment strategies and advancements in the field.
news.headline: University of Phoenix leaders to present at AALHE conference on May 27-30, 2025 in Virginia. Workshop on AI assessment planned.
US bank deposits rose to $18.154 tln from $18.149 tln in the prior week.

news.summary: Plus Therapeutics, Inc. has been notified by Nasdaq about a deficiency due to the delayed filing of their Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q. The company has not met the deadline for the filing, which has prompted Nasdaq to issue the notification. It is crucial for Plus Therapeutics to address this deficiency promptly to maintain compliance with Nasdaq regulations. Failure to rectify this issue could result in further implications for the company's listing on the stock exchange. It is essential for Plus Therapeutics to take swift action and meet the necessary requirements to avoid any negative consequences.
news.headline: Plus Therapeutics, Inc. notified by Nasdaq for delayed filing of Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q.

news.summary: Jayud Global Logistics Limited, a supply chain solution provider in Shenzhen, received a notice from Nasdaq stating they are not in compliance with the minimum bid price requirement of $1 per share for 30 consecutive days. The company has until November 11, 2025, to regain compliance, and it is currently trading below $1 per share. Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) mandates the minimum bid price, and if not met for 30 consecutive days, as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810(c)(3)(A), the company faces delisting. Jayud has approximately six months to rectify this issue to avoid potential delisting from the Nasdaq Capital Market.
news.headline: Jayud Global Logistics faces Nasdaq minimum bid price deficiency, below $1.00/share for 30 days; granted 180 days to comply.

news.summary: In Raanana, Israel, on May 23, 2025, Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ), a biotech company specializing in intranasal hydrogels, received a delisting notification from Nasdaq. The decision was based on a review of the company's SEC filings. Despite this, the immediate delisting of Polyrizon's ordinary shares under symbol "PLRZ" on the Nasdaq Capital Market has not taken place. The notification does not currently impact the trading status of the company's shares.
news.headline: Polyrizon (Nasdaq: PLRZ) receives Nasdaq delisting notice but no immediate delisting effect; no current impact on trading.

news.summary: Today, INNOVATE Corp. (NYSE: VATE) disclosed that its subsidiary DBM Global Inc. will distribute a cash dividend of around $5.5 million, equating to $1.42 per share, on June 16, 2025, to stockholders of record as of June 2, 2025. The majority stockholder, INNOVATE, anticipates receiving about $5 million from this dividend. Individual stockholders of INNOVATE will not be eligible for this cash dividend.
news.headline: INNOVATE's DBM Global to pay $5.5 million dividend, with INNOVATE receiving $5 million on June 16, 2025.

news.summary: A former Heisman Trophy winner and viral influencer will be live dealing blackjack and spinning roulette on the ReBet app and website based in Hanover, NH. This exciting event will allow users the opportunity to interact with the celebrity while playing casino games. Stay tuned for this unique experience!
news.headline: Celebrities Johnny Manziel and Bryce Hall to host live dealer night with blackjack and roulette on ReBet platform.

news.summary: San Francisco-based Marin Software Inc. (NASDAQ: MRIN), a digital marketing software provider for advertisers and agencies, recently announced receiving a Notice from Nasdaq regarding delayed filing of its quarterly report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. The notice, received on May 21, 2025, addresses the delinquency issue and potential non-compliance with Nasdaq listing qualifications. Marin's stock market performance is closely watched, making timely financial filings crucial. This development underscores the importance of adhering to regulatory reporting requirements for the company, its shareholders, and the market.
news.headline: Marin Software (NASDAQ: MRIN) faces Nasdaq notification due to late Form 10-Q filing, risking continued listing.

news.summary: In Miami, Florida on May 23, 2025, Oyster Enterprises II Acquisition Corp (Nasdaq: OYSEU) successfully completed its expanded initial public offering. The Company closed the offering of 25,300,000 units, encompassing an additional 3,300,000 units exercised by the underwriters through their over-allotment option. Priced at $10.00 per unit, the public offering generated total gross proceeds amounting to $253,000,000.
news.headline: Oyster Enterprises II Acquisition Corp raised $253 million in a $253,000,000 Initial Public Offering in Miami, Florida.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, in Estero, Florida, Hertz Global Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: HTZ) revealed its intention to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 at 8:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, August 7, 2025. The subsequent earnings call is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day. This announcement came through a live webcast by the Company.
news.headline: Hertz Global Holdings, Inc. will reveal Q2 2025 results on Aug 7, 2025, at 8:00 am ET, with an earnings call at 9:00 am ET.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, in Pleasanton, California, Movano Health (Nasdaq: MOVE) disclosed that it had been notified by the Listing Qualifications Department of the Nasdaq Stock Market about a lapse in filing requirements. The notice served as a reminder to the Company about the outstanding filing.
news.headline: Movano Health (Nasdaq: MOVE) notified of deficiency by Nasdaq for delay in filing Form 10-Q quarterly report.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. announced the release of its latest monthly portfolio update from April 30, 2025. The Fund, listed as AFB on the NYSE, disclosed its top 10 fixed-income holdings, with the City holding the highest portfolio percentage.
news.headline: AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. releases monthly portfolio update as of April 30, 2025, with top 10 fixed-income holdings.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, the AllianceBernstein Closed-End Funds announced distributions for its various funds. Notably, the AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AWF) would be distributing $0.0655 per share. The ex-date, record date, and payment date for this distribution are set for 6/5/2025, 6/5/2025, and 6/20/2025, respectively.
news.headline: AllianceBernstein Closed-End Funds announce distributions: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund paying $0.0655 per share on 6/20/2025.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. [NYSE: AWF] published its latest monthly portfolio update as of April 30, 2025. The Fund shared details about its top 10 fixed-income holdings including U.S. Treasury Notes and other investments. This release provides investors with insight into the composition of the Fund's portfolio as of the end of April 2025.
news.headline: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. [NYSE: AWF] released monthly portfolio update as of April 30, 2025 with top 10 fixed-income holdings.

news.summary: Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU), a leading global financial technology platform known for Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, disclosed that Sandeep Aujla, the chief financial officer, is set to speak at the Jefferies Public Technology Conference on May 28, 2025. The fireside chat is scheduled to commence at 8:30 a.m. Pacific Time (11:30 a.m. Eastern Time) and can be accessed live through an audio webcast on Intuit’s investor relations website.
news.headline: Intuit CFO Sandeep Aujla to present at Jefferies Public Technology Conference on May 28, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. PT.

news.summary: Exton, Pennsylvania - Bentley Systems, Incorporated (Nasdaq: BSY), a leading infrastructure engineering software company, has disclosed a dividend payout of $0.07 per share for the second quarter of 2025. The dividend payment is scheduled for June 12, 2025, and will be distributed to all stockholders holding Class A and Class B common stock as of the closing of business on June 3, 2025. Bentley Systems is trusted globally by infrastructure professionals for its innovative software solutions.
news.headline: Bentley Systems declared a $0.07 per share dividend for Q2 2025, payable on June 12 to stockholders of record by June 3.

news.summary: Denver-based company CSG (NASDAQ: CSGS) revealed today that its Board of Directors has given the green light for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per share of common stock. Shareholders of record by June 18, 2025 will receive the dividend on July 2, 2025. CSG specializes in assisting businesses in creating memorable experiences and facilitating seamless connections, usage, and payments for essential services. The company focuses on enhancing customer experience, billing, and payment processes.
news.headline: CSG Systems Int'l approves quarterly dividend of $0.32 per share to be paid on July 2, 2025 for shareholders of record on June 18, 2025.

news.summary: A prominent work management platform company, Asana, Inc. (NYSE: ASAN), disclosed the participation of its Chief Financial Officer, Sonalee Parekh, in upcoming investor events. Parekh is set to speak at the Bank of America 2025 Global Technology Conference on June 4, 2025, at 10:40 a.m. PT / 1:40 p.m. ET, followed by the Baird 2025 Global Consumer, Technology & Services Conference on June 5, 2025, at 7:50 a.m. PT / 10:50 a.m. ET. The announcements were made with an emphasis on the company's commitment to engaging with shareholders and stakeholders. Interested individuals can access a live webcast of the events.
news.headline: Asana CFO Sonalee Parekh to present at Bank of America and Baird investor events on June 4 & 5, 2025.
